homepage.landing: Immerse yourself in captivating stories that challenge your mind and spark your imagination

login.title: Welcome!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your listening journey.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join us and start your journey

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

emailSent.title: Check Your Email
emailSent.message: We've sent a password reset link to
emailSent.instructions: Please check your inbox and click on the link to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.

resetSuccess.title: Password Reset Successful!
resetSuccess.message: Your password has been successfully reset.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long

howToUse.title: How to Use This App?
howToUse.subtitle: Master English listening skills with our interactive audio player.

overview.title: What Makes This Player Special?
overview.description: This isn't just an ordinary audio player. It's designed specifically to help you improve your English listening skills through interactive, sentence-by-sentence learning.

sentenceMode.title: Sentence Mode
sentenceMode.description: Activate this special mode to automatically pause after each sentence. Perfect for focused listening practice.
sentenceMode.autoPauseDesc: Audio stops automatically after each sentence
sentenceMode.nextButtonDesc2: (right arrow) to play the next sentence
sentenceMode.whyHelpsDesc: Gives you time to process what you heard before moving forward

timeMarkers.title: Time Markers
timeMarkers.description: Visual indicators showing where sentences start and end, helping you navigate through the story efficiently.
timeMarkers.point1: Each marker represents a sentence boundary
timeMarkers.point2: Some markers group related sentences (complete ideas) together
timeMarkers.point3: Click on any marker to jump to that part instantly
timeMarkers.point4: Great for reviewing specific parts of the story

speedControl.title: Quiz Game!
speedControl.description: After you listen, make sure you understood everything - take a short quiz on the content.
speedControl.slowDesc: Listen to the story without interruptions to get the overall understanding
speedControl.normalDesc: Listen again and answer questions that appear during the story
speedControl.fastDesc: Questions may test what you heard (audio recognition) or meaning comprehension
speedControl.tipDesc: Difficulty level affects question complexity - start with easier levels and progress gradually

subtitles.title: Subtitles
subtitles.description: Follow along with text subtitles for all stories. Toggle them on or off based on your learning needs.
subtitles.firstListenDesc: Try without subtitles to test your comprehension
subtitles.secondListenDesc: Turn on subtitles to confirm understanding
subtitles.thirdListenDesc: Turn off subtitles again to reinforce learning

easy.title: Easy
easy.description: Simple vocabulary, clear pronunciation, slower pace

medium.title: Medium
medium.description: Moderate vocabulary, natural pace, some idioms

hard.title: Hard
hard.description: Advanced vocabulary, fast pace, complex sentences

step1.title: Select Your Level
step1.description: Choose Easy, Medium, or Hard based on your current skills

step2.title: Pick a Story
step2.description: Browse through 10 stories in your chosen level

step3.title: Activate Sentence Mode
step3.description: Toggle it on for sentence-by-sentence practice

step4.title: Start Listening
step4.description: Use → for next, R for repeat

activeListen.title: Active Listening:
activeListen.description: Focus on understanding, not just hearing

repetition.title: Repetition is Key:
repetition.description: Don't hesitate to replay sentences multiple times

progressive.title: Progressive Challenge:
progressive.description: Start with subtitles, then try without

adjustSpeed.title: Adjust Speed:
adjustSpeed.description: Begin slower, increase as you improve
